mapper.sql: index_id, park_key, car_no, order_no, car_type_no, enter_time, enter_gate_name, enter_operator_name, lock_car, enter_img_path,create_time,update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT left(car_no,1) caron,count(*) carcount from get_enter_car scm
and enter_time like Concat(#{entertime},'%')
GROUP BY left(car_no,1) order by carcount desc
mapper.insert:
insert into get_enter_car (index_id, park_key, car_no, order_no, car_type_no, enter_time, enter_gate_name, enter_operator_name, lock_car, enter_img_path,create_time,update_time ) values
( #{item.indexId}, #{item.parkKey}, #{item.carNo}, #{item.orderNo}, #{item.carTypeNo}, #{item.enterTime}, #{item.enterGateName}, #{item.enterOperatorName}, #{item.lockCar}, #{item.enterImgPath}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime} )
on duplicate key update order_no = values(order_no), car_type_no = values(car_type_no), enter_time = values(enter_time), update_time = sysdate()
